pilot_tasks.objective: Confirm H3 REVERSED finding with null controls (shuffled/random directions)

substeps.description: Load GPT-2 Small + SAE at layer 8 from gpt2-small-res-jb
Load 100 features from full_h3 (reuse same indices)
Compute steering effects for all 100 features at alpha=3 and alpha=10
Compute null controls: shuffled directions and random unit vectors
Compare effect sizes: high-abs vs low-abs vs shuffled vs random

pass_criteria.high_abs_stronger: High-absorption mean effect > Low-absorption mean effect at alpha in {3, 10}
pass_criteria.no_errors: No NaN, no OOM, no CUDA errors

fallback_plan.if_null_controls_non_zero: Investigate: is the steering effect from residual stream interference rather than genuine feature causation?
fallback_plan.if_high_abs_weaker: H3 reversal is confirmed as pilot artifact — revert to original H3 prediction
fallback_plan.if_spearman_r_negative: H3 direction inconsistent with full_h3 — investigate measurement difference

pilot_tasks.reuse_from: full_h3 feature indices and alpha=5 results

pilot_tasks.objective: Check Gemma-2B SAE availability and compute preliminary absorption atlas

substeps.description: Attempt to load Gemma-2B SAEs from gemma-2b-res release
If gated, attempt HuggingFace token auth or fall back to Pythia-2B
Compute absorption scores at layers [4, 8, 12] (quick check)

pass_criteria.sae_loads: Gemma-2B or Pythia-2B SAE loads successfully
pass_criteria.layers_computed: Absorption computed for at least 3 layers

fallback_plan.if_gemma_gated: Use Pythia-2B (pythia-70m-deduped) as GPT-2 alternative for cross-model validation
fallback_plan.if_both_fail: Report Gemma/Pythia unavailable; focus paper on GPT-2 only

full_experiment_trigger.if_triggered: Proceed to full_h3_null in parallel with pilot_h1_gemma analysis
full_experiment_trigger.if_not_triggered: Diagnose failure, revise null control protocol, re-run pilot

subsequent_pilots.objective: Evaluate absorption effect on TruthfulQA (real causal reasoning) instead of synthetic pairs
subsequent_pilots.note: Addresses evolution lesson: H5 pilot causal task has near-random discriminability (AUC ~0.5)
